ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., 20MICRONS) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., technology, finance, healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., software, banking, pharmaceuticals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trading data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "traded_quantity" INTEGER /* Total traded quantity of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "day_high" REAL /* Day's high price of the stock */,
  "day_low" REAL /* Day's low price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NSE, NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., cash, margin, futures) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "equity" REAL /* Current equity of the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, blocked) */,
  "account_open_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account that holds the position */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the position */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the position */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Entry price of the stock in the position */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss price of the stock in the position */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take-profit price of the stock in the position */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., long, short) */,
  "position_status" TEXT /* Status of the position (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account that placed the order */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit, stop-loss) */,
  "order_price" REAL /* Price of the order */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, filled, cancelled) */,
  "filled_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the order that was filled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange that provided the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock in the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of market data (e.g., real-time, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trading activity, market analysis) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., trading, analytics) */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
